precheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'displayName'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'displayName'
)

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'post'
    AND column_name = 'embedding'
)

execute.sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."post" ALTER COLUMN "embedding" TYPE vector(1536) USING "embedding"::vector(1536)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM pg_attribute a
  JOIN pg_class c ON c.oid = a.attrelid
  JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace
  WHERE n.nspname = 'public'
    AND c.relname = 'post'
    AND a.attname = 'embedding'
    AND format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) = 'vector(1536)'
    AND NOT a.attisdropped
)
